AddressInfo.Title: AC at BMW Haute Cabriere Franschoek
AddressInfo.AccessComments:
Hours:
Mon - Sat: 09:00 - 17:00
Sun: 09:00 - 16:00

Charging Hours: Only within trading hours

GeneralComments:
Surrounded on three sides by mountains with varying soils and slopes, Franschhoek’s terroir is undoubtedly distinctive. At Haute Cabrière, we love thoughtful simplicity and so do not over manipulate fruit but follow gentle cellar practices to showcase our

terroir. Combine this with a passion for innovation and colouring outside the lines and you end up with a range of quality wines from Franschhoek composed of pioneering blends and intriguing single varietals for you to enjoy
